response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and excellent communication skills, they critically lack the mandatory requirements for this role. They have approximately 6 months of C++ experience from a decade ago, far short of the required 5-10 years of hands-on professional C++ development on Windows. Additionally, they lack any capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domain expertise. Recent career focus on web, mobile, and AI infrastructure does not bridge these fundamental gaps.
strengths: Excellent communication and documentation skills, evidenced by multiple talks, workshops, and educational initiatives
Demonstrated experience with CI/CD pipelines, Java, and SQL provides some transferable technical foundations
Broad software engineering expertise across multiple languages and platforms shows strong problem-solving abilities
concerns: Only ~6 months of C++ experience from 2014-2015, far below the mandatory 5-10 years requirement; recent work focuses on TypeScript, DLang, and Node.js
Zero demonstrated experience in capital markets, fixed income, investment banking, or financial services domain
No evidence of Windows platform development, SQL Server/Oracle expertise, or capital markets-specific tools and frameworks
